name: Precot Limited
summary: Precot Limited manufactures and sells yarn and technical textile products in India. It offers normal, compact, organic, BCI, slub, doubled, gassed, and open end cotton yarns; polyester cotton blend yarns; cotton dyed yarns; and polyester sewing threads. The company also provides health and hygiene products consisting of finished products in normal, organic, and BCI cotton forms, such as cosmetic make up removal pads, cotton balls, pleat/zig zag products, and cotton wool rolls; roll and absorbent cotton; and fabrics. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Precot Meridian Limited and changed its name to Precot Limited in December 2020. Precot Limited was founded in 1962 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
